description: Remove #![allow(dead_code)] directives and fix all resulting compiler warnings in baro-tui

userStories.description: Remove `#![allow(dead_code)]` from crates/baro-tui/src/theme.rs. Run `cargo build 2>&1` to identify unused constants (likely SURFACE, TAB_ACTIVE, TAB_INACTIVE, RETRY, GAUGE_BG). Delete only the constants the compiler flags as unused. Run `cargo build` again to verify zero warnings from theme.rs.
userStories.title: Remove dead_code allow from theme.rs and delete unused constants

userStories.description: Remove `#![allow(dead_code)]` from crates/baro-tui/src/events.rs. Run `cargo build 2>&1` to identify unused items. The `DagNode::title` field is constructed in executor.rs but never read (only `id` is extracted in app.rs). Either remove the field and update executor.rs to stop setting it, or keep it if serde deserialization requires it. Also check `StoryInfo` fields. Fix all warnings the compiler reports. Run `cargo build` again to verify zero warnings from events.rs.
userStories.title: Remove dead_code allow from events.rs and fix unused fields

userStories.description: Remove `#![allow(dead_code)]` from crates/baro-tui/src/app.rs. Run `cargo build 2>&1` to identify unused items. Known suspects: `App::tick()` method (unused — main.rs increments tick_count directly), `current_level` field (set internally via update_current_level() but never read by any screen renderer), possibly `update_current_level()` if current_level is removed. For each warning: if truly unused, delete it; if it should be used, wire it up. Run `cargo build` again to verify zero warnings from app.rs.
userStories.title: Remove dead_code allow from app.rs and fix unused items

userStories.description: Run `cargo build 2>&1` on the entire workspace and verify there are absolutely zero dead_code warnings remaining in crates/baro-tui/src/. Also verify no `#![allow(dead_code)]` directives remain in theme.rs, app.rs, or events.rs. If any warnings remain, fix them. Ensure the application still compiles successfully.
userStories.title: Verify full build has zero dead_code warnings
